content: The legal-gated merge path is complete. PR 381 is merged, and I verified the merged `main` artifact still opens from `file://`, passes `node tests.js`, and shows no immediate browser errors.

Dave reports PR 381 was reviewed and merged this round after an explicit legal review comment. He verified file:// open, no console errors, and node tests.js passing, so there is no follow-up needed from my side on that PR.
